queries.question: List all documentaries and also list mini-series that have 7 episodes.
queries.sql:
SELECT TvShow.title 
FROM TvShow
WHERE TvShow.tv = "Documentary Series" OR TvShow.tv = "Mini-Series" AND TvShow.number_of_episodes = 7
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?tvshow a :Tv_Show .
  ?tvshow p:title ?title .
  ?tvshow p:tv ?tv_w .
  ?tvshow p:tv ?tv_w2 .
  ?tvshow p:number_of_episodes ?number_of_episodes_w .
  FILTER((STR(?tv_w) = "Documentary Series" || (STR(?tv_w2) = "Mini-Series" && (STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "7" || STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "7.0"))))
}

queries.question: What documentaries have 7 episodes and what mini-series has the same number of episodes?
queries.sql:
SELECT TvShow.title 
FROM TvShow
WHERE (TvShow.tv = "Documentary Series" OR TvShow.tv = "Mini-Series") AND TvShow.number_of_episodes = 7
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?tvshow a :Tv_Show .
  ?tvshow p:title ?title .
  ?tvshow p:tv ?tv_w .
  ?tvshow p:tv ?tv_w2 .
  ?tvshow p:number_of_episodes ?number_of_episodes_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?tv_w) = "Documentary Series" || STR(?tv_w2) = "Mini-Series")) && (STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "7" || STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "7.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show documentaries and mini-series that have 7 episodes.
